query: SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS img0, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[1].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS img1, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[2].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS img2, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[3].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS img3 FROM guestSessions WHERE id = 30002;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RfxnZb4sKQE9yA3.root --database SGdPHKr3xPrRPbHA9C9esB --execute SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS img0, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[1].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS img1, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[2].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS img2, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[3].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS img3 FROM guestSessions WHERE id = 30002;
